findings.description: No confirmation dialog appears before session deletion
findings.expected: A confirmation dialog should appear asking user to confirm delete
findings.actual: Clicking Delete in context menu produces no confirmation dialog

findings.description: Delete action silently fails - session remains in sidebar
findings.expected: Session should be removed from sidebar after delete
findings.actual: Session 'Crispy Meadow' remains in sidebar after clicking Delete

findings.description: No user feedback after delete action - no toast, no notification
findings.expected: User should receive feedback about the result of the delete action
findings.actual: No visible feedback of any kind after clicking Delete
